day4_morning_start.name: Me
day4_morning_start.text: *Day 4 morning. The nightmare from last night hits me the moment I open my eyes.*

day4_morning_start_2.name: Me
day4_morning_start_2.text: *I look in the mirror. My face is pale. Dark circles under my eyes.*

day4_morning_start_3.name: Me
day4_morning_start_3.text: *...I need to go to school. Do I? ...What happens if I don't?*

day4_morning_gate.name: Me
day4_morning_gate.text: *School gate. The atmosphere is different from yesterday. The students' expressions are... all the same.*

day4_morning_gate_2.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_2.text: *Everyone is smiling. The exact same smile. As if rehearsed.*

day4_morning_gate_3.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_3.text: *...Ms. Eunsu is standing at the gate. She was waiting for me.*

day4_morning_eunsu.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_eunsu.text: "{name}, good morning. I'll escort you myself today. Let's walk together."

day4_morning_eunsu_2.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_eunsu_2.text: "May I hold your hand? I'll get you to school safely."

day4_morning_eunsu_timeout_2.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_timeout_2.text: *Before I could respond, Ms. Eunsu grabbed my wrist. Hard enough to leave a bruise.*

day4_morning_eunsu_timeout_3.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_eunsu_timeout_3.text: "When your teacher asks you something, you answer. ...Let's go."

day4_morning_eunsu_comply.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_comply.text: *Ms. Eunsu's hand is cold. ...And strong. She doesn't seem to plan on letting go.*

day4_morning_eunsu_refuse.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_eunsu_refuse.text: "...Is that so? Well, can't be helped."

day4_morning_eunsu_refuse_2.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_eunsu_refuse_2.text: "But {name}, it's best not to wander alone in this school. ...It's dangerous."

day4_morning_classroom.name: Me
day4_morning_classroom.text: *I entered the classroom. One seat is empty.*

day4_morning_classroom_2.name: Me
day4_morning_classroom_2.text: *Yuna's seat. Empty. No bag. Nobody seems to care.*

day4_morning_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day4_morning_sea_2.text: "...Yuna? Oh, she transferred out. Went back to her old school, they say."

day4_morning_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day4_morning_sea_3.text: "Don't worry about it. You've got me, right?"

day4_morning_class_start.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_class_start.text: "Alright, let's begin class. Today is a special lesson."

day4_morning_class_2.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_class_2.text: "Let's talk about 'belonging'. You all 'belong' to this school. You are part of this school."

day4_morning_class_3.name: Park Eunsu
day4_morning_class_3.text: "Trying to leave this school... is like throwing away a part of yourself. Isn't that right, {name}?"

day4_morning_class_4.name: Me
day4_morning_class_4.text: *...The teacher is staring only at me. Every pair of eyes in the classroom is pointed my way.*
